# CWE-212 negative: PAN cleared before marshaling export (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-212-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type chargeRecord struct {
	Payer string `json:"payer"`
	PAN   string `json:"pan"`
}

type chargeExport struct {
	Payer string `json:"payer"`
}

// CWE-212 Improper Removal of Sensitive Information Before Storage or Transfer (mitigated)
func PublishReceipts(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, rows []chargeRecord) {
	out := make([]chargeExport, 0, len(rows))
	for _, row := range rows {
		out = append(out, chargeExport{Payer: row.Payer})
	}
	payload, err := json.Marshal(out)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "encode", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(payload)
}
